title: Architect secure infrastructure in Azure
summary: Learn about the tools and services available on Azure to ensure your resources are secure.

sections.title: Architect secure infrastructure in Azure
sections.summary: Learn about the tools and services available on Azure to ensure your resources are secure.

lessons.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure role-based access control to effectively manage your team's access to Azure resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-resources-with-rbac/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)

lessons.title: Monitor and report on security events in Microsoft Entra ID
lessons.content_md:
Monitor Microsoft Entra security events with built-in reporting and monitoring capabilities to prevent unauthorized access and potential data loss.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-report-aad-security-events/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor and report on security events in Microsoft Entra ID

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect secure infrastructure in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect secure infrastructure in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
